description_long: This airplane features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly light gray exterior constructed from block-like segments. The wings are broad and sharply swept, extending outward with a unique double-pronged tip on each side, giving the aircraft a distinctive silhouette. The fuselage is relatively flat and wide, with a central raised section that likely houses the cockpit, which is subtly indicated by a darker, slightly recessed area near the front. Small colored accents, including red and green blocks, are visible on the upper surface, possibly representing navigation lights or sensors. The rear of the airplane displays a compact tail section with minimal vertical stabilizer presence, emphasizing a low-profile, stealth-inspired look. The overall appearance suggests a blend of modern and conceptual design elements, suitable for urban or sci-fi environments.
description: A futuristic, blocky airplane with wide, swept wings and a flat, angular fuselage featuring colored accent blocks and a compact tail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, double-pronged wings and the central raised cockpit area with colored accent blocks.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat, layered structure of the fuselage and the pronounced sweep of the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the compact tail section and the symmetrical extension of the wings, with visible colored blocks at the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the stepped, blocky construction and the low-profile design of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept, double-pronged wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the exterior.
attribute_tail_design: Minimalist tail with a low-profile, conventional configuration and no prominent vertical stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the central raised section of the fuselage.
